# atlassian_jira_group (Data Source)

Use this data source to look up a Jira Cloud group by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "atlassian_jira_group" "example" {
  name = "jira-software-users"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the group to look up.

### Read-Only

- `group_id` (String) The ID of the group.
